---
title: "A Sharp Three-Window Threshold and Finite-Memory Conjugacy in Fibonacci Stabilization"
subtitle: "Symbolic dynamics and ergodic theory"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, symbolic, submitted]
target-journal: "Journal of Physics A"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity"
theorems: 70
featured: false
video: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold_video.mp4"
slides: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold_slides.pdf"
podcast: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold_podcast.wav"
description: "A sharp threshold at window size m=3: for m>=3 the stabilized-window map is injective with image topologically conjugate to the full two-shift. The conjugacy transports the full thermodynamic formalis..."
---

::: {.paper-badges}
[Journal of Physics A]{.badge-journal}
[Submitted]{.badge-status-submitted}
[70 Theorems]{.badge-theorems}
[Symbolic dynamics and ergodic theory]{.badge-scope}
:::

## Abstract

A sharp threshold at window size m=3: for m>=3 the stabilized-window map is injective with image topologically conjugate to the full two-shift. The conjugacy transports the full thermodynamic formalism exactly.

**Keywords:** subshifts of finite type, topological conjugacy, thermodynamic formalism, Fibonacci numeration

## Infographic

![fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/papers-media-v1/fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold_infographic.png)

## Video Explainer

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold_video.mp4 >}}

::: {.media-downloads}
[📊 Slides](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold_slides.pdf)
[🎧 Podcast](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold_podcast.wav)
[🎬 Video](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity/releases/download/media-v1/fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold_video.mp4)
[🖼️ Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/papers-media-v1/fibonacci_stabilization_sharp_threshold_infographic.png)
:::

## Paper & Source

- [Full Paper (source in this repo)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/tree/master/papers/fibonacci-stabilization-sharp-threshold-conjugacy-nonlinearity/)
- [Machine-verified proofs (Lean 4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
